parsed_review.summary:
CP00-468 is a descriptor-only RP15 analytics-core pack (Risk A, 10 units, RP15.P06.M05.S21-RP15.P06.M06.S08: the M05 Permission And Audit Binding tail of 2 rows + the M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head of 8 rows). Verdict: PASS (no findings).

Verified core claims: (1) production_ready is correctly false and runtime_ready false; implementation_layer is 'descriptor'; the Hermes packet exposes only production_ready_candidate (coverage.valid && slice.valid) so there is no production/enterprise-trust overclaim. (2) Counts are internally consistent across the source-plan binding (manifest plan_binding_snapshot == baseline source_plan_pack), contracts/analytics-core-contract.json (current_pack + p06_permission_fixture_slice_descriptor), registry.js (ANALYTICS_CORE_CP468_REQUIREMENTS/PACK_BINDING), validators.js (validateAnalyticsCoreCp468Coverage), manifest.json, and model.test.js: 10 units, micro_phase rows M05:2/M06:8, micro_title {Permission And Audit Binding:2, Synthetic Fixture Set:8}, deliverable distribution {test:2, security_audit:2, implementation:6} (sums to 10); deviation_from_plan:false is supported. (3) No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced by freezeCp468Result (all runtime/write/storage/audit/permission flags false; synthetic_only/no_real_data/loads_real_fixture_data guards set) and by per-row guards asserted in validators and tests (descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, raw_payload_included:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true) for all 8 M06 rows including the two security_audit rows (Permission matrix row, Audit hint fields); contract no-leak flags (exposes_permission_decision_detail/audit_event_body/blocked_claim_detail/hermes_packet_body/fixture_payload all false). command-evidence reports all gates exit 0 (node --check/--test, rp05-rp15 validators, closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/control-plane/goal/fullplan/test/validate/build, git diff --check), production_ready:false, no_real_data:true, writes_product_state:false. (4) Claude remains a read-only reviewer, not final approver: descriptor.authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval:false, no_write_attestation.promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false; allowed_tools Read/Grep/Glob only. (5) Hermes (H15) is used only for the deterministic descriptor review packet/receipt (receipt_shape descriptor_only..._no_write; emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not product runtime. (6) Review hardening: forbidden_review_evidence (inherited from CP453 requirements) encodes failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, disabled_tools_run, missing_raw_output_reference, missing_source_inspection_basis, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, and production_enterprise_trust_claim rejections; readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1434-byte valid JSON, non-zero stdout); validation-report shows forbidden_tools_present:false, summary_only_review_allowed:false (correct for security_audit deliverables present), source_inspection_mode read_tools_used.

The prior CP00-467 P3 (README mislabeled the M04 tail as the 'full M04 cycle') is remediated here: the CP00-467 README entry now reads 'the M04 Secondary Workflow Slice tail (the twenty remaining rows)', matching the recommended wording, and the CP00-468 entry correctly describes the M05 tail (two remaining rows) and M06 head (first eight rows). Changed-file scope correctly isolates the 7 tracked analytics files (+ index.js, unchanged, which re-exports all CP468 public exports via export *); unrelated dirty/untracked files (docx, workbook/*, ldip invalid-attempt, new-session-handoff) are correctly excluded and not treated as in-scope. The absent claude-review-result.json / adjudication.md / construction-inspection.json are expected post-review artifacts per the hardened_review_sequence, not gaps. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues identified.
